title: github.com/iwc-workflows/atacseq/main
author: Lucille Lopez-Delisle
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This workflow take as input a collection of paired fastq. It will remove bad quality and adapters with cutadapt. Map with Bowtie2 end-to-end. Will remove reads on MT and unconcordant pairs and pairs with mapping quality below 30 and PCR duplicates. Will compute the pile-up on 5' +- 100bp. Will call peaks and count the number of reads falling in the 1kb region centered on the summit. Will plot the number of reads for each fragment length.
steps_raw: This workflow take as input a collection of paired fastq. It will remove bad quality and adapters with cutadapt. Map with Bowtie2 end-to-end. Will remove reads on MT and unconcordant pairs and pairs with mapping quality below 30 and PCR duplicates. Will compute the pile-up on 5' +- 100bp. Will call peaks and count the number of reads falling in the 1kb region centered on the summit. Will plot the number of reads for each fragment length.
